creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Trond.Endrestol from comment #3)
make packages tries to run "icingacli setup", which icingacli doesn't recognize:

(cd /usr/ports/workdirs/usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2/work/stage/usr/local/www/icingaweb2 &&  ./bin/icingacli setup config webserver apache --path=/icingaweb2  --root=/usr/local/www/icingaweb2/public --config=/usr/local/etc/icingaweb2  --file=/usr/ports/workdirs/usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2/work/stage/usr/local/share/examples/icingaweb2/apache/icingaweb2.conf)
ERROR: There is no such module or command: 'setup'

The same thing happens without WRKDIRPREFIX set:

(cd /usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2/work/stage/usr/local/www/icingaweb2 &&  ./bin/icingacli setup config webserver apache --path=/icingaweb2  --root=/usr/local/www/icingaweb2/public --config=/usr/local/etc/icingaweb2  --file=/usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2/work/stage/usr/local/share/examples/icingaweb2/apache/icingaweb2.conf)
ERROR: There is no such module or command: 'setup'

OS is FreeBSD somehost 11.0-STABLE FreeBSD 11.0-STABLE #0 r314325: Mon Feb 27 09:07:03 CET 2017     root@somehost:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/XENGUEST  amd64 1100509 1100509

FS is ZFS, but exec is allowed:

NAME                      PROPERTY  VALUE  SOURCE
zroot/usr/ports           exec      on     default
zroot/usr/ports/workdirs  exec      on     default

I have attached complete typescripts to the case.
